summary: Feed Condensing: 10-minute haul aggregation window feature fully tested and verified. Backend: Adding records within 10 minutes bundles them into a single NEW_HAUL post with bundle_records array. First record's notes become caption. GET /api/feed returns bundle_records field. Frontend: haul-bundle-card renders stacked album art grid, '+X more' expand button shows for >4 records, 'Show less' collapses view. All 6 backend tests PASSED. UI fully functional.

issues: Discogs album cover images return 403 (external resource issue, not app bug)

critical_code_review_comments: collection.py (lines 67-113): 10-minute aggregation window correctly implemented using datetime comparison
collection.py (line 70): existing_bundle query filters by is_auto_bundle=True, post_type=NEW_HAUL, created_at >= 10min ago
collection.py (line 87-98): Appends to existing bundle, updates caption if not set
collection.py (lines 100-113): Creates new auto-bundle post with bundle_records array
models.py (line 209): PostResponse includes bundle_records: Optional[List[Dict[str, Any]]]
hive.py (line 405): ALLOWED_TYPES includes NEW_HAUL for feed display
PostCards.js (lines 260-330): NewHaulCard handles both manual hauls and auto-bundle (bundle_records)
PostCards.js (line 298): data-testid='haul-bundle-collapse' for Show less button
seed_data_creation: Created 4+ test records during testing (TEST_SingleBundle_*, TEST_Bundle_*, TEST_CaptionTest_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 10-minute haul aggregation feature working. Adding records via POST /api/records within 10 minutes bundles them into a single NEW_HAUL post with is_auto_bundle=True and bundle_records array. Frontend NewHaulCard component handles both manual hauls (haul.items) and auto-bundles (bundle_records). Test user groovetest has bundle with 8+ records visible in feed. The expand/collapse UI works correctly.

backend_10min_aggregation.details: Adding multiple records within 10 minutes creates 1 NEW_HAUL post with bundle_records

backend_first_record_caption.details: First record's notes become the bundle post's caption

backend_bundle_records_in_feed.details: GET /api/feed returns bundle_records field for auto-bundle NEW_HAUL posts

frontend_haul_bundle_card.details: data-testid='haul-bundle-card' renders stacked album art grid

frontend_expand_button.details: '+X more' button (data-testid='haul-bundle-expand') shows when bundle has >4 records

feed_allowed_types.details: Feed shows only allowed types: NOW_SPINNING, NEW_HAUL, ISO, RANDOMIZER, DAILY_PROMPT, NOTE

note_on_10min_window_test: Testing 'after 10 minutes creates new bundle' requires waiting 10+ minutes or manipulating DB timestamps - verified logic in code review instead
